members.name: GetAvailablePacketCount
members.summary: Returns the number of packets currently available in the ring-buffer.

members.name: GetPacketError
members.summary: Returns the error state of the last packet received (via [method get_packet] and [method get_var]).

members.name: GetVar
members.summary: Gets a Variant. If [param allow_objects] is [code]true[/code], decoding objects is allowed. Internally, this uses the same decoding mechanism as the [method @GlobalScope.bytes_to_var] method. [b]Warning:[/b] Deserialized objects can contain code which gets executed. Do not use this option if the serialized object comes from untrusted sources to avoid potential security threats such as remote code execution.

members.name: PutVar
members.signature: public int PutVar(Variant var, bool fullObjects)
members.summary: Sends a [Variant] as a packet. If [param full_objects] is [code]true[/code], encoding objects is allowed (and can potentially include code). Internally, this uses the same encoding mechanism as the [method @GlobalScope.var_to_bytes] method.

members.name: EncodeBufferMaxSize
members.summary: Maximum buffer size allowed when encoding [Variant]s. Raise this value to support heavier memory allocations. The [method put_var] method allocates memory on the stack, and the buffer used will grow automatically to the closest power of two to match the size of the [Variant]. If the [Variant] is bigger than [member encode_buffer_max_size], the method will error out with [constant ERR_OUT_OF_MEMORY].
